details.test: Task 1: Book cheapest womens cut with wash & style after 5 PM next Thursday
Task 2: Book curly-hair specialist between 10 AM and 12 PM next Wednesday
Task 3: Choose best-value cut and color package with >= $10 savings
Task 4: Request balayage consultation from gallery within next 14 days
Task 5: Order $100 email-delivered gift card scheduled in 14 days
Task 6: Subscribe to newsletter with hair care tips and promotions
Task 7: Plan men’s visit with multiple services under $90 and request quote
Task 8: Add two bottles of sulfate-free color-treated shampoo under $30 with rating 4+ to cart
Task 9: Request callback outside peak hours within next 30 days
